records.ety: [L. dactylus, Gr. da`ktylos a finger, a dactyl. Cf. Digit.]

defs: A poetical foot of three syllables (— ), one long followed by two short, or one accented followed by two unaccented; as, L. tëgmn, E. merciful; -- so called from the similarity of its arrangement to that of the joints of a finger.
A finger or toe; a digit.
The claw or terminal joint of a leg of an insect or crustacean.
